title: Synthetic smoke case for scoring resource-implementation guidance
description: A synthetic adjudicated case used to verify that the regression harness can score a resource-implementation result deterministically.

scope.notes: Smoke-test case only. Not a substitute for a real sanitized PR-derived fixture.

mustCatch.description: The guidance should prefer stronger validation when the accepted values or formats are knowable.
The guidance should return comprehensive parser errors directly rather than wrapping them redundantly.

mustNotFlag.description: The guidance should not require SDK enum helpers when the accepted subset is known to be narrower.

notes: Use this case as a runner smoke test while real PR-derived fixtures are being authored.
